flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at University of Wisconsin-Stevens Point rose 14% between 2021 and 2024 ($8.3k → $9.5k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at University of Wisconsin-Stevens Point fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (2.2% → 0.0%).
